title: Proclamation No. 247, s. 1964
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 247

RESERVING FOR PROVINCIAL CAPITOL, PROVINCIAL JAIL, HOUSING PROJECT, GOLF COURSE, PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL, PHILIPPINE CONSTABULARY BARRACKS, PROVINCIAL HIGH SCHOOL, BUREAU OF PUBLIC HIGHWAYS, AND GIRL AND BOY SCOUTS SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN ILIGAN CITY, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for provincial capitol, provincial jail, housing project, golf course, provincial hospital, Philippine Constabulary barracks, provincial high school, Bureau of Public Highways, arid Girl and Boy Scouts site purposes under the respective administration of the Provincial Government of Lanao del Norte, the Director of Hospitals, the Chief of Staff of the Armed Forces of the Philippines, the Director of Public Schools, the Commissioner of Public Highways, and the Girl and Boy Scouts of the Philippines, subject to private rights, if any there may be, to future subdivision survey in accordance with the development plan to be prepared and approved by the National Planning Commission, as well as to the condition that the provincial government shall negotiate with the occupants with a view to reimbursing them of the reasonable value of their improvements thereon or relocating them elsewhere, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in Iligan City and more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Lot 5178, Iligan Cadastre, Case 2

°A parcel of land (Lot 5178 of the cadastral survey of Iligan, L.R.C. Cad. Record No. ——–), situated in the City of Iligan. Bounded on the W., along lines 1-2-3, by Lot 4016, Iligan Cad.; on the W. and S., along lines 3 to 56, inclusive, by Provincial Road to Dansalan; on the NW., along line 56-57, by Lot 2040, Iligan Cad.; on the NE. and E., along lines 57 to 238, inclusive, by Old Road to Dansalan; on the SE., along line 238-239, by Lot 5395; on the SW., along line 239-240, by Lot 2283, along line 240-241, by Lot 2282, along line 241-242, by Lot 3455; on the W., along lines 242-243-244-245, by Lot 2036; along lines 245-246-247, by Lot 2035; and along lines 247-248-249-250-251-1, by Lot 4016, all of Iligan Cadastre. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Old Points; bearings true; date of the cadastral survey, Sept. 8, 1949 to June 30, 1955.

Lot 5, Sgs-2430 which will be sold under the provisions of the Public Land Act to the Marcelo Steel Corporation pursuant to the contract entered into by and between the said Corporation and the National Power Corporation shall be excluded from the operation of this proclamation.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of May, in the year of Our, Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-four.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: CALIXTO O. ZALDIVAR Acting Executive Secretary
